name: Nifty Monthly Iron Condor
hypothesis: Limits the theoretical infinite risk of a strangle by buying further OTM wings. Suitable for strictly defined risk profiles in neutral markets.

entry_rules.position_sizing: Sell 20-delta Call/Put, Buy 10-delta Call/Put. Iron Condor wings width = 500 points.

exit_rules.stop_loss: Exit if underlying breaches the sold strike.
exit_rules.time_exit: Exit 7 days before expiry to avoid gamma risk.

notes: Lower profitability than strangle but strictly defined risk.
